tasks.title: Replace SKILL.md with Gen 2 JSON-contract version
tasks.superseded_by: go-windows11-hardening pass. SKILL.md updated via iterative hardening passes (Pass 0-3).
tasks.objective: Replace the current go skill definition with the Gen 2 JSON-contract redesign.
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md uses active-plan.json as the scheduler source of truth
SKILL.md defines active-task_{RUN_ID}.json and task-result_{RUN_ID}.json as canonical contracts
SKILL.md removes dependence on task-contract markdown and plan.md loop semantics

tasks.title: Replace go-safe.sh with Gen 2 JSON-contract wrapper
tasks.superseded_by: final go authority cleanup (pass 3). go-safe.sh removed. direct python orchestrate.py is canonical.
tasks.objective: Replace go-safe.sh so it validates active-plan.json, previews the next eligible task, and runs /go using the Gen 2 contract model.
acceptance_criteria: go-safe.sh fails if active-plan.json is missing
go-safe.sh validates that active-plan.json is parseable JSON
go-safe.sh previews the next eligible task before invoking /go
go-safe.sh prints active-task_{RUN_ID}.json and task-result_{RUN_ID}.json if they exist

tasks.title: Replace ralph-go-loop.sh with per-task RUN_ID loop
tasks.note: TASK-002 superseded; TASK-003 dependency may need review.
tasks.objective: Replace ralph-go-loop.sh so it keeps TERMINAL_ID stable, generates a new RUN_ID per cycle, and uses active-plan.json plus artifact files as loop truth.
acceptance_criteria: ralph-go-loop.sh keeps one TERMINAL_ID for the session
ralph-go-loop.sh generates a new RUN_ID for each cycle
ralph-go-loop.sh reads active-plan.json before and after each cycle
ralph-go-loop.sh exits ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE when no eligible tasks remain
